title: Tehran slams 'intolerable' US naval blockade as Trump signals prolonged siege
snippet: Pezeshkian: blockade is 'extension of military operations' despite ceasefire. 'Continuation of this oppressive approach is intolerable.' Trump told oil executives to prepare for prolonged blockade. Iran calls US actions 'maritime piracy.'
tag_reason: 페제시키안의 '참을 수 없다' 발언과 봉쇄=군사작전 연장 규정은 5/1 신규 성명
